name: Julia Child's Chocolate Mousse
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Sweet or semi-sweet baking chocolate, melted
1 cup Heavy cream (ensure it is the heavy variety)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the baking chocolate with the strong coffee.
2. Add the unsalted butter to the melted chocolate and mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, whip the egg yolks until pale.
4. Gradually add the heavy cream to the yolk mixture, stirring gently.
5. Combine the egg whites and instant sugar in another bowl, beating until stiff peaks form.
6. Fold the whipped egg white mixture into the chocolate-butter-cream mixture until well combined.
7. Pour the mousse into serving dishes and refrigerate until set.
